name: useCounter
examples: const { count, dec, inc, reset, set } = useCounter(5);
const { count, dec, inc, reset, set } = useCounter({ initialValue: 5, min: 0, max: 10 });

returns.name: An
returns.description: object containing the current count and functions to interact with the counter

source.source: * @returns {UseCounterReturn} An object containing the current count and functions to interact with the counter
